SETT CONF: ROBERT AUNE, JPT; DAN MACDUFF, CLERK. PLTF AP PEARS WITH COUNSEL, STEVEN E. LITTMAN. DEFT APPEARS IN PRO PER. THERE IS NO SETTLEMENT. THE TRIAL DATE IS MAINTAINED.

RDONDERO, JUDGE; AHUIE, CLERK; CSR - SARA LERSCHEN CAUSE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 504 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. STEVEN E. LITTMAN APP. FOR PLTF, DEFT JORGE MOLINA APP. IN PRO PER. CT & COUNSEL MET IN CHAMBERS, PARTIES REACHED A SETTLMT, DETAILS ON RECORD. PARTIES STIP TO ENTER JUDGMT. DEFT TO PAY BACK RENT OF $2,480 PLUS GARAGE RENT FOR $400. LATE CHARGE FOR 3 MOS. ($31.50/MO) & FOR GARAGE ($10.00/MO). DEFT HAS 6 MOS TO VACATE THE PREMISES & PLTF WILL WAIVE RENT FOR 3 MOS. PREMISES TO BE IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. IF DEFT FAIL TO VACATE BY SAID DATE, PLTF CAN FILE EXPARTE APPL.FOR REPOSSESSION. IF DEFT COMPLY, PLTF WILL FILE DISMISSAL. AFTERWARDS EACH PARTY WAIVES ANY CLAIMS AGAIN THE OTHER. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMT.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA, JORGE
